{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323153237CBE737F990371D7C0A49\"}"},"total":1100},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7501963951493792537","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"构思很有意思，希望后面同样精彩，作者还要多用点心，经常前后不一可不行。加油"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1746691358,"group_id":"7310114733821004862","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5i4FRK8wA4+T0xRH8Rs51P9VpqMD5CdrP9XNEVnsGpn","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1125522988866639","user_name":"雪克"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1125522988866639","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7310114733821004862","book_info":{"abstract":"主角因意外变成植物人，虽生理死亡，但精神不灭，在病房中看到女友背叛自己，一怒之下吞噬了其他看笑话病友们的灵魂，致使精神力大增，后因为一款游戏，不仅身体得到康复，并且还能将游戏中的人物带出来，从此现实、游戏之中大展拳脚，财富美女通通拿下，敌人嘛，就交给召唤出来的小弟了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5d3b2a72d6ee270abd7498ccb37bafee","author":"大司驴","author_id":"","book_id":"7310114733821004862","book_name":"全民网游，契约野怪带到现实","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#480800","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":262,\"name\":\"都市脑洞\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262\u0026name=都市脑洞\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1,\"name\":\"都市\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1\u0026name=都市 r_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7310114733821004862","book_info":{"abstract":"主角因意外变成植物人，虽生理死亡，但精神不灭，在病房中看到女友背叛自己，一怒之下吞噬了其他看笑话病友们的灵魂，致使精神力大增，后因为一款游戏，不仅身体得到康复，并且还能将游戏中的人物带出来，从此现实、游戏之中大展拳脚，财富美女通通拿下，敌人嘛，就交给召唤出来的小弟了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5d3b2a72d6ee270abd7498ccb37bafee","author":"大司驴","author_id":"","book_id":"7310114733821004862","book_name":"全民网游，契约野怪带到现实","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#480800","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":262,\"name\":\"都市脑洞\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262\u0026name=都市脑洞\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1,\"name\":\"都市\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1\u0026name=都市\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":91,\"name\":\"多女主\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91\u0026name=多女主\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7310457093776114216","read_count":"14828","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1163522"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.7","serial_count":"571","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,多女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/966d7647530d13ab39c948603f53890f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779435157\u0026x-signature=SR1Pv1QzXpielvuqx4tZYi85WSk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1666459847897492","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"195"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323153237CBE737F990371D7C0A49\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":25808,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":5061},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7485059541095645976","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"一本题材不错简介很吸引人开篇也比较有吸引力的书，看得出来作者的构思布局很不错，可惜被作者写的远不是那么回事，小逻辑漏洞百出，不合理的毒点也隔几章出现一次，游戏内容的数值错误也经常出现，主角的智商忽高忽低情商也是时而幼稚时而精明，作者的剧情补丁经常都出现在好几章之后，把这些缺点都忽略那可以说这是一个有吸引力的好故事，里面包括主角大部分出场人物都不是好人且性格特点鲜明，关于游戏的大部分剧情都不错且部分现实剧情也有亮点，可谓是一本有亮点有缺点的小说，书荒可看。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1742764735,"group_id":"7310114733821004862","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"懒得介绍了","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzCVTB4BoDVf3dJO3T0IE7KQs6+XVAJbm/V7k1JZ+KsE","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/43c7783d8ba149b380bc0cc88a36ed63~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776789754\u0026x-signature=Uw0AfSZckPuyGqYM%2FTXpLXMITII%3D","user_id":"4094199181879444","user_name":"滴~吃货卡"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4094199181879444","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7310114733821004862","book_info":{"abstract":"主角因意外变成植物人，虽生理死亡，但精神不灭，在病房中看到女友背叛自己，一怒之下吞噬了其他看笑话病友们的灵魂，致使精神力大增，后因为一款游戏，不仅身体得到康复，并且还能将游戏中的人物带出来，从此现实、游戏之中大展拳脚，财富美女通通拿下，敌人嘛，就交给召唤出来的小弟了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5d3b2a72d6ee270abd7498ccb37bafee","author":"大司驴","author_id":"","book_id":"7310114733821004862","book_name":"全民网游，契约野怪带到现实","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#480800","creation_
